title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Science Museum Visit
questions.text: The 3D film is included in your museum ticket, but seats must be reserved at the information desk. The film is popular, so book your seat when you arrive, not just before it starts.
questions.question: What should visitors do?

options.A: Reserve film seats early at the museum.
options.B: Buy a separate ticket for the film.
options.C: Arrive only when the film starts.

questions.explanation: Visitors should reserve seats when they arrive.

questions.heading: Message from Grace to Tom
questions.text: Tom, I found the website for the campsite. It looks nice, but there’s no shop nearby. We should take breakfast food with us, even if we plan to eat out later.
questions.question: What is Grace suggesting?

options.B: They should bring some food with them.
options.A: They should choose a campsite near shops.
options.C: They should avoid eating out later.

questions.explanation: Grace says they should take breakfast food.

questions.heading: Borrowed Laptops
questions.text: School laptops may be taken home for homework, but they must be returned by 9 a.m. the next school day. Please report any damage before using the laptop, not after returning it.
questions.question: What does the label tell students?

options.C: They should mention problems before they start.
options.A: They can keep laptops for several days.
options.B: They must repair damaged laptops themselves.

questions.explanation: Students should report damage before using the laptop.

questions.heading: From: Coach Martin / Subject: Saturday match
questions.text: The match will go ahead on Saturday, but the grass pitch is too wet. We’ll play on the artificial pitch instead, so please bring trainers as well as football boots.
questions.question: What is Coach Martin telling players?

options.A: They need footwear for a different surface.
options.B: The match has been moved to Sunday.
options.C: They should leave football boots at home.

questions.explanation: Players need trainers because they will play on the artificial pitch.

questions.heading: Craft Workshop
questions.text: Make a wooden photo frame in our craft workshop. Children under ten must work with an adult because small tools are used. Finished frames can be painted at home after the glue has dried.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.B: Younger children need adult help in the workshop.
options.A: All painting must be finished during the workshop.
options.C: Adults cannot take part in making frames.

questions.explanation: Children under ten must work with an adult.
